events.description: ETH price crosses below ETH DMA; crypto sleeve must clear to stable.
events.rationale: All validation strategies must respect ETH-specific cross-down risk-off behavior on this window.

events.description: BTC price crosses below BTC DMA; crypto sleeve must clear to stable.
events.rationale: All validation strategies retain crypto DMA cross-down risk-off behavior.

events.description: SPY price crosses below SPY DMA; SPY sleeve should risk off to stable if it has exposure.
events.rationale: SPY cross-down risk-off applies to SPY-bearing portfolio-rule strategies.

events.description: SPY must not be increased while its 30-day signal re-entry cooldown remains active; existing BTC/ETH exposure from prior DCA can be preserved by a hold.
events.rationale: Per-symbol cross-down cooldown must suppress SPY re-entry through early April even when SPY has a cross-up. Portfolio-rule cooldown is local to each rule and no longer creates a global hold gate, so this event verifies cross_up_equal_weight is skipped without asserting that prior DCA crypto exposure is liquidated.

events.description: BTC price crosses above BTC DMA; crypto risk-on should DCA a non-zero amount from stable.
events.rationale: BTC cross-up redeploy applies to BTC-bearing rule-based strategies.

events.description: SPY price crosses above SPY DMA; existing stable should redeploy into SPY on cross-up or latch-follow-through days.
events.rationale: SPY cross-up redeploy is covered by the first-match cross-up rule; follow-through absorption is covered by the next latch fixture.

events.description: ETH has no price-vs-ETH-DMA cross_up near 2025-04-22; SQL resolves the next ETH cross_up to 2025-06-09.
events.rationale: ETH cross-up applies to ETH-bearing rule-based strategies in this window.

events.description: ETH/BTC ratio crosses up; strategies should surface the above-ratio transition in the inner ratio zone.
events.rationale: Pins the canonical portfolio-rule strategy's binary ETH/BTC ratio rotation rule.

events.description: BTC cross_down should liquidate crypto while preserving an existing SPY sleeve. SQL-resolved event date is 2025-10-18.
events.rationale: BTC cross-down SPY preservation applies to the canonical portfolio-rule strategy in this window.

events.description: ETH cross_down should liquidate crypto while preserving an existing SPY sleeve.
events.rationale: ETH cross-down SPY preservation applies to prod's adaptive ETH-reference path in this window; the BTC-reference minimum variants have no ETH DMA cross-down event here.

events.description: ETH should still be in its cross-down cooldown period; assertions define which assets may move.
events.rationale: ETH should not be reduced on this date even though this is not a fresh DMA cross-up trigger; the flat DMA stable gate may still surface a sell intent when another crypto sleeve remains in fear below DMA.

events.description: ETH/BTC ratio has a whipsaw near 2026-01-16; SQL resolves the sustained cross_down to 2026-01-20. Strategies should surface the below-ratio transition in the inner ratio zone.
events.rationale: All validation strategies retain inner ETH/BTC ratio-zone detection; final allocation may be overridden by outer stable/SPY gating.

events.description: SPY price crosses below SPY DMA; SPY sleeve should risk off to stable if it has exposure.
events.rationale: SPY cross-down risk-off applies to SPY-bearing portfolio-rule strategies.

events.description: SPY cross_up should redeploy pre-existing stable into SPY through the follow-through latch. SQL-resolved event date is 2026-04-08.
events.rationale: Should turn all stables into SPY
